federal_use_case_description: Specset is intended to be included as a third-party information resource within other cloud service offerings operated by FedRAMP-certified providers, rather than sold directly to agencies.

assessment_commitment.note: Per the FedRAMP 2026 Consolidated Rules, an independent assessment for a full operational class (B, C, or D) will be scheduled within 24 months of initial listing.

_note: This is an intent/placeholder metadata file supporting an Initial Implementation marketplace listing request. The authoritative machine-readable format for FedRAMP public offering information (CDS-CSO-PUB) is FedRAMP's own published JSON Schema / OSCAL; see https://github.com/FedRAMP/rules. This file will be replaced with a schema-conformant package before Class A submission.
